name: Open Telemark and Wing
preceding_figure_names: Back Whisk, Basic Weave, Contra Check, Fallaway Whisk, Open Impetus, Open Telemark, Outside Change, Turning Lock, Turning Lock to R, Weave From Promenade Position, Whisk
following_figure_names: Closed Telemark (taking step 1 in CBMP OP on L side), Open Telemark (taking step 1 in CBMP OP on L side), Double Reverse Spin (taking step 1 in CBMP OP on L side), Progressive Chasse To R (taking step 1 in CBMP OP on L side), Reverse Turn (taking step 1 in CBMP OP on L side), Drag Hesitation, Fallaway Reverse And Slip Pivot, Whisk (at corner)
notes: Wing can be used from other positions. Less turn can be made on Wing to end facing LOD.

steps.action: LF fwd | DC | HT | start to turn L
LF to side and slightly fwd in PP | Pointing DW, body facing wall
RF back | BDC | TH | start to turn L
LF closes to RF (Heel Turn) | FLOD | HT
RF diag. fwd and slightly to R in PP, R side leading | Pointing LOD | TH | slightly body turn to L
